HI THIS IS SO RANDOM but uhh thinking of building a casiah team any tips? ik i dont have her i will get her trust!!!! it kinda doesnt have to be good it just has to be usable… this is not for meta reasons I just think she’s very cool these are the characters I have thanks!!!

There are many ways to use Casiah <:Catsiah:1441868724226228265> 
-# Albeit some of them are exclusive to arc 2 ruleset due to her soulforge talent 

She has amazing synergy with Mouchette, providing 0-cost strike via Telekinesis, tons of card draw and extra temporary strength stacking
So you could run Mouchette - Casiah - Horla - Lily/Castor, very much a meta team
A bit awkward with no E1 Horla, but you could potentially replace her with Karen, Ogier or maybe Daffodil
Lily is technically replaceable with Ogier and Alva too, but she is the best sustain option you have for Ultra Mouchette

Alternatively, she can enable Daffodil by being her source of strength and pulling the extra mirage from ultra space with Telekinesis 
Ideally, the team would be Daffodil - Casiah - Horla/GDoll/Winkle - Lily/Nautila/Pandia, but you can always fill the empty slot with Castor, though lack of consistent aliemus generation from Horla/GDoll will hurt 

Once you get to arc 2, there are some more fun options due to the extra synergy between Poof and aftershock/prepare 
The popular one is discard team with Corposant - Aurita - Murpy/Tulu/GMurphy - Casiah
You can also experiment with something like Miryam - Castor - Daffodil - Casiah, capitalizing on Casiah's ability to instantly discount Miryam's rouse by 3
-# Would love to try that myself, but don't have Miryam and am saving pulls for Xu

Just to ask, isn't this better than analysis of death? Since it's +12 and all
And also is it Gluttony or Greed that i need to equip?  Cause greed is the extra black marks, gluttony is 20% max hp instead of orisons

analysis of death is roughly 20% crit rate and crit dmg and also gives like 60 aliemus after every fight

Let's say you put this on jenkin. It increases base dmg by 60%, no str, no crit. Only card jenkin plays with dmg worth considering is swarm impact. So you are leaping your 1 swarm impact which does as much damage as if it crit. You also get like 8 aliemus every turn, which realistically is not going to be more than 5 turns per fight, so 40 aliemus under perfect conditions where you only leap jenkin cards, never get onyx plumes from castor cards, and take years to beat every fight

Analysis of death not only gives more aliemus on average, it also gives a comparable damage buff but for EVERY card that jenkin plays
gluttony is better than greed
greed is not worth a wheel slot
despite what flares and some guides will tell you

Can someone help me 
I want to use Goliath, but I don’t know how he works, who he works best with or what he needs 🥹
so when does maintenance start
an hour from now

Goliath works best in Aequor or Tentacle Dmg Comps(Rarely but sometimes in mixed Realm STR/Tent Dmg comps). They are used for cheesing bosses *sometimes*. Despite his kit pointing him to being a DPS, he lacks the numbers to output such. Thus making Goliath much more of a Burst Turn Exalt Awakener. His Exalt offers two options, “Dormancy” and “Unsurp”, in which 99% of the time you will go “Unsurp”. “Unsurp” gives you massive Temp STR scaling off your Tent Dmg, allowing you to create a nuclear warhead of a burst turn. Both options gives you 3 “Blade Dominions” with Prepare and Retain, but these attacks are still fairly *weak* so you wouldn’t want them in your hand(having a full hand automatically destroys them), or you could Retain them for 3 turns(3 flippin turns…) until they become 0 cost free attacks due to Prepare. For his cards, you want to keep his Strike and Defend for Aliemus. His 1 cost, “Law of the Strong”, has niche scenarios where at E2, it steals all of the enemies STR temporarily. This either helps you survive a turn from a STR stacking boss, or you can steal all the STR from the STR stacking boss and one shot the boss, using its own mechanics against it. His 3 cost “Decapitation Strike” is far too weak for its cost, making it free 50 Sigils or Heal. His Rouse is lacking as you gain only a wee bit of STR and Tent Dmg ONLY when he attacks(p.s he rarely attacks…), hence it’s never necessary to Rouse Goliath. For his CoV, you could run any Support CoV such as “Burial Grounds”, “Re-Evolution”, “Life Drain”(If you have no choice), and “Crimsum Pulse”(Tentacles gain Crit Chance whenever you gain Crit Chance). For WoDs, any Support WoDs that give Keyflare, Death Res, Dmg Amp, or helpful passives.
